name: Bufo Merge
author: Poki
description: Bufo Merge is a merge-and-defend game where you build an army of adorable but powerful frogs! Start with simple eggs, merge two of the same kind to evolve stronger frogs, and place them on the battlefield. Face off against waves of quirky monsters like mice or snakes, earn coins for each victory, and use them to summon even more creatures. Can you keep up with the attacks and build the ultimate defense? How to play Bufo Merge? Click or tap to select an item. Click and hold to merge. Who created Bufo Merge? Bufo Merge is created by Neutronized. Play their other game on Poki: Slime Laboratory , Roar Rampage , Slime Laboratory 2 , Snow Tale , Picnic Penguin , Magic Bridge , Lost Yeti , Yokai Dungeon , Mimelet , Drop Wizard Tower , Dyna Boy , Shadow Trick , Double Panda and Slime Pizza ! How can I play Bufo Merge for free? You can play Bufo Merge for free on Poki. Can I play Bufo Merge on mobile devices and desktop? Bufo Merge can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
